fields.title: Hardcoded secret in source
fields.body: API key is hardcoded directly in the source file. This should be moved to environment variables.
fields.suggestion: Move this to environment variables or a secrets manager.

fields.title: Missing error handling
fields.body: This API endpoint does not handle the case where the user is not found.
fields.suggestion: Wrap this in a try/except block and return a 404 response.

fields.title: Inefficient loop structure
fields.body: Using a list for membership checks inside a loop. This is O(n) per check.
fields.suggestion: Use a set instead of a list for O(1) lookups.

fields.title: Missing type annotation
fields.body: Function parameters lack type annotations, reducing code readability.
fields.suggestion: Add type hints for better maintainability.

fields.title: SQL injection vulnerability
fields.body: Raw SQL query uses string formatting with user input.
fields.suggestion: Use parameterized queries or the ORM instead.

fields.title: Race condition possible
fields.body: Counter increment is not atomic, may cause incorrect rate limiting under load.
fields.suggestion: Add a lock or use an atomic operation to prevent concurrent access.

fields.title: Debug mode enabled in production config
fields.body: DEBUG is set to True in what appears to be a production settings file.
fields.suggestion: Use environment variables to control DEBUG and ensure it is False in production.

fields.title: Unused variable detected
fields.body: Variable 'result' is assigned but never used in this test.
fields.suggestion: Remove the unused variable or use it in an assertion.

fields.body: This API key should be stored in a .env file and loaded via django-environ or os.getenv().
Converting this to a set would improve lookup performance significantly.
Please use Django ORM or at minimum cursor.execute() with parameterized queries.
Set DEBUG = os.getenv('DEBUG', 'False') == 'True' to control this via environment.
